zh.Drayton, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾德雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Arden於大約1372年出生在英國奧可福爾德雷頓時，她的父親Sir Giles Arden Knight18歲，母親Johanna Trillow23歲。她於大約1388年與William Cliker在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在英國貝德福爾朗斯頓享年49歲。

zh-hans.Drayton, Oxfordshire, England: 英国英格兰奧可福爾德雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Arden于大约1372年出生在英国奧可福爾德雷頓时，她的父亲Sir Giles Arden Knight18岁，母亲Johanna Trillow23岁。她于大约1388年与William Cliker在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年在英国貝德福爾朗斯頓享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Arden was born about 1372, in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Sir Giles Arden Knight, was 18 and her mother, Johanna Trillow, was 23. She married William Cliker about 1388, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1420, in Roxton, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Arden est née environ 1372, à Drayton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Giles Arden Knight, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Johanna Trillow, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Cliker environ 1388, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Roxton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Arden um 1372 in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Giles Arden Knight 18 und ihre Mutter Johanna Trillow 23. Sie hat um 1388 in England, United Kingdom William Cliker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Roxton, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Arden è nata il circa 1372 nel Drayton, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Giles Arden Knight, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Johanna Trillow, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Cliker circa 1388, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1420, nel Roxton, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Drayton, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアドレイトン
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Ardenが約1372年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた時，父Sir Giles Arden Knightは18歳，母Johanna Trillowは23歳であった。約1388年にイギリスイギリスでWilliam Clikerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアロクストンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Arden(이)가 대략 1372년 영국 스퍼드실르 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Giles Arden Knight(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Trillow(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1388년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William Cliker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 베드퍼드실르 록스턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Drayton, Oxfordshire, England: Drayton, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Arden nasceu aproximadamente 1372, em Drayton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Giles Arden Knight, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Trillow, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cliker aproximadamente 1388, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Roxton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Arden родилась около 1372 г. в местности дреитон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Giles Arden Knight было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Trillow, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cliker около 1388 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности рокстон, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Arden nació aproximadamente 1372, en Drayton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Giles Arden Knight, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Johanna Trillow, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Cliker aproximadamente 1388, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1420, en Roxton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
